CustomField.description: Rent Remaining is the sum of the rent slips minus the approved or paid invoices [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION: Deprecated this field] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: Stepped_Rent__c] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: Rent_Remaining__c] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1211557698320453/task/1210539422112047?focus=true Reason: we created a new field on Rent schedule object to calculate Rent Remaining at that level. Hence this field is no longer needed on Lease object Release version: v60]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Rent Remaining is the sum of the rent slips minus the approved or paid invoices
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2602 Rent Remaining
